attributes.summary: Southwest Airlines has issues with accident on a separate plane in which a passenger.

attributes.summary: Southwest Airlines has issues with unfair and deceptive trade practices.
attributes.article_sentence: The head of the Department of Transportation, Pete Buttigieg, is suing Southwest Airlines alleging unfair and deceptive trade practices for operating flights that experienced serial delays, and agreed to a settlement in which Frontier Airlines will pay a $650,000 civil penalty over chronically delayed flights.

attributes.summary: Martinair Holland NV merges with KLM Royal Dutch Airlines.
